## Problem

What user problem are we trying to solve?

## Proposed Outcome

What should the user be able to do after this feature is shipped?

## Scope

- [ ] UI/UX only
- [ ] Command planner update
- [ ] Local executor update
- [ ] Safety policy update
- [ ] Docs and onboarding update

## Acceptance Criteria

List 2-5 concrete criteria that can be tested.

## Risks

Any safety, privacy, or abuse concerns?

## Notes

Optional extra details, references, or mockups.
